task: Find the HGX H100 driver for Ubuntu 22.04 on AMD64 CPU.
final_result_response:
I have found the HGX H100 driver for Ubuntu 22.04 on AMD64 CPU on the NVIDIA website. Here is the information I gathered:

**Driver:** Data Center Driver for Ubuntu 22.04 590.48.01 | Linux 64-bit Ubuntu 22.04

| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| **Driver Version** | 590.48.01 |
| **Release Date** | Mon Dec 22, 2025 |
| **Operating System** | Linux 64-bit Ubuntu 22.04 |
| **CUDA Toolkit** | 13.1 |
| **Language** | English (US) |
| **File Size** | 774.47 MB |

**Driver Details Page:** https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/drivers/details/259246/

The driver was found by navigating to NVIDIA Drivers → Manual Driver Search → selecting **HGX-Series | HGX H100 | Linux 64-bit Ubuntu 22.04** (where "Linux 64-bit" corresponds to the AMD64/x86_64 architecture). The recommended/certified version is **590.48.01** with CUDA Toolkit **13.1**, released on **December 22, 2025**, with a file size of **774.47 MB**.
